candidates.title: Yoga School Website Revamp and Enhancement
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for multi-page layout and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Project Title: Website Redesign for Yoga Teacher Training School in Goa Project Description: We are looking for a talented freelance web designer/developer to redesign and improve our existing website for a Yoga Alliance-certified yoga school based in Goa, India. Our goal is to create a modern, professional, and user-friendly website that better reflects our brand, improves the experience for prospective students, and increases inquiries and course bookings. Current Website: Tapas Yoga India Scope of Work * Review and improve the overall website design * Create a modern and visually appealing layout * Improve user experience and navigation * Redesign key pages such as: * Home Page * 200-Hour Yoga Teacher Training * 300-Hour Yoga Teacher Training * Yoga Retreats * About Us * Contact Page * Improve mobile responsiveness * Enhance course presentation and information structure * Improve inqu

candidates.title: Facebook & Instagram Ad Content Creation
candidates.brief: I’m focusing my digital marketing efforts entirely on social media and I need a creative partner who can turn Facebook and Instagram into reliable lead-generating channels. The scope is limited to paid placements, so everything you produce should be designed for Ads Manager rather than organic posts. My priorities: • Advertisements that meet each platform’s best-practice specs (static or carousel visuals paired with concise, persuasive copy). • Short-form videos and Reels, 15-30 seconds each, formatted 1:1 and 9:16, ready for split-testing. • All source files and export presets so I can update or localise assets later. You’ll handle concept development, copywriting, graphic design or basic video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or any comparable tool), and delivery of final creatives in ready-to-upload formats. candidates.title: Create Professional Shopify App Store Demo Video — Avatar Intro + Website/App Walkthrough
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Project Title: Create Professional Shopify App Store Demo Video — Avatar Intro + Website/App Walkthrough Project Description: We are looking for an experienced SaaS/product video creator to produce a professional demo video for our Shopify App Store listing. The product is DisputeDesk, a Shopify app that helps merchants manage chargebacks and build structured dispute evidence. We already have a rough screen recording / YouTube demo, but we want the final result to feel much more professional, clear, and suitable for a Shopify App Store product listing. The video should NOT simply be a raw screen recording. We want a polished product introduction video with an avatar presenter, voiceover, website walkthrough, app walkthrough, zooms, callouts, and clean transitions. Video structure we want: 1. candidates.title: Tech Channel Video Editor Needed
candidates.brief: I publish tech-focused content several times a week and now need a reliable editor who can handle both long-form reviews (8–12 minutes) and short vertical cuts for YouTube Shorts, Reels and TikTok. I haven’t locked in a single editing style yet—the channel is still experimenting—so if you enjoy switching between fast-paced jump-cuts, more detailed explanatory pacing or an effects-heavy approach, feel free to show me what you can do. Every edit should be platform-ready. That means a 16:9 master for YouTube plus a reformatted 9:16 or 1:1 version whenever the topic suits social media. I always supply 4K footage, screen recordings, b-roll and a rough talking-head guide; you turn it into a polished story with on-brand text overlays, background music that doesn’t clash with narration, and light-weight animations that highlight specs, prices or key takeaways. candidates.title: Remove Flicker From 15-Sec Clips
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have several 15-second MP4 clips that focus on myself as Elvis, but a persistent flicker runs through every frame and ruins the footage. I need the flickering cleaned up so the clips look stable, natural, and ready for promotional use. Also, anything else that can be done to make these look highly professional. Please work with whatever professional tool you trust—After Effects with a Flicker Free plug-in, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or a similar solution—as long as the result is seamless. Keep the original resolution and aspect ratio intact and return the files in the same MP4 format. Deliverables: • Final MP4 clips with flicker fully removed • Same duration, frame rate, and quality as the sources. I’ll share a download link to the raw files as soon as we start and will review the first corrected clip to confirm the look before you batch the rest.

candidates.title: AI UGC Video Ad Creation
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I need a short-form video ad built entirely from user-generated product reviews, crafted with AI so it stops thumbs on Instagram and drives straight-up product sales. The raw UGC snippets are ready; what I’m missing is the creative magic that turns them into a polished, scroll-stopping clip. Here’s what matters most to me: • A clear sales hook in the opening seconds • Authentic on-screen quotes or voiceovers from real reviewers (no scripted actors) • Fast-paced vertical format (1080×1920) optimised for Instagram Reels and Stories • Smart AI touches—dynamic captions, subtle motion graphics, colour matching—handled in tools like Runway ML, Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or your preferred stack • A/B-friendly: I’d like up to three headline/CTA variants baked in so I can test which one converts best Deliverables 1. 15–30 second master video (MP4, H.264) 2. Editable project file with all layered
